mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_ai_result (post_id, task_type, status, attempt_count) VALUES (#{postId}, #{taskType}, 'PENDING', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'PENDING', result_json = NULL, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NULL, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post_ai_result SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_json = #{resultJson}, model = #{model}, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = #{taskType}
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, task_type, status, result_json, model, error_message, attempt_count, created_at, completed_at FROM post_ai_result WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = #{taskType}
